items.title: Fraud and risk scoring
items.description: Banks and payment processors train XGBoost/LightGBM on transaction features for real-time fraud probability — histogram training handles high-volume logs.

items.title: Click and conversion modeling
items.description: Ad tech and e-commerce predict CTR and purchase propensity from user, context, and item features — GBDT libraries dominate structured leaderboard benchmarks.

items.title: Customer churn and retention
items.description: Telecom and SaaS teams score churn risk from usage and billing history; class-weight and early stopping manage imbalance and overfitting.

items.title: Demand and supply forecasting
items.description: Retail and logistics regress unit sales or delivery times on promotions, weather, and calendar features when targets are continuous tabular outcomes.

items.title: Healthcare tabular prediction
items.description: Readmission risk, length-of-stay, and diagnosis support models on EHR-derived tabular features — missing labs routed in-tree or imputed upstream.

items.title: Search and ranking LTR features
items.description: Learning-to-rank pipelines often use GBDT on handcrafted relevance features before neural rerankers — fast iteration with histogram splits.
